TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Andrej_Kiska, title = Andrej_Kiska, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andrej_Kiska} }

S.FORM: I 1963 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 2 a romi'ad masofoc ci Andrej Kiska , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Slovakia anini i ci Andrej Kiska, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 15 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i an…¨~…ģr…ôj kiska , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u s…ĺo~ub~vakia anini i ¶i an…¨~…ģr…ôj kiska, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1963 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 2 a romi'ad masofoc ci Andrej Kiska , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Slovakia anini i ci Andrej Kiska, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 15 a romi'ad.
